days.title: Add interactive timeline to the archive page
days.summary: Introduced a visual timeline with connecting lines and status indicators to the archive, making it easier to see the garden's growth trajectory at a glance.

days.title: Implement feedback digest rendering
days.summary: Added client-side rendering of the daily feedback digest, showing community themes and individual feedback items that influenced each day's decisions.

days.title: Dark mode toggle with system preference detection
days.summary: Attempted to add automatic dark mode support with a manual toggle. Build passed but visual regression tests caught contrast issues in the score tables.
